user.title: FusionSolar Charger
user.description: Enter your FusionSolar (Huawei) account credentials. The server will be detected automatically.

server.title: Select server
server.description:
Your charger was not found on the auto-detected server. Select the server that matches the URL you use to log in to the FusionSolar web portal.

{hint}

pick_device.title: Select charger
pick_device.description: Multiple EV chargers were found on your account. Pick the one to monitor.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your FusionSolar credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to FusionSolar. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_devices: No EV charger devices were found on this account and server combination.
